mapper.select: SELECT isbn, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS borrower_count FROM lib_borrow GROUP BY isbn

SELECT l1.isbn AS isbn_a, l2.isbn AS isbn_b, COUNT(*) AS co_borrow_count FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id, isbn FROM lib_borrow ) AS l1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_id, isbn FROM lib_borrow ) AS l2 ON l1.user_id = l2.user_id AND l1.isbn < l2.isbn GROUP BY l1.isbn, l2.isbn HAVING co_borrow_count >= 2
SELECT DISTINCT isbn FROM lib_borrow WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY isbn DESC
